seo.title: The Reveal — Presto's Quarterly Design Report
seo.description: The quarterly design report for people who run businesses, not design studios. New trends, real examples, and what it all actually means for you — free.

hero.subline: The quarterly design report for people who run businesses, not design studios. New trends, real examples, and what it all actually means for you — in one short read.

banner.text: A quarterly briefing on brand, web & digital design.

items.title: The clarity comeback
items.description: Why Pantone just picked white as its colour of the year, and what it signals for brands drowning in visual noise.

items.title: The hat that rebranded a bank
items.description: How a £4bn UK challenger bank ditched its logo for an orange bowler hat, and why it worked.

items.title: Findable by humans. Findable by AI.
items.description: The quiet shift already changing how customers discover businesses like yours.

items.title: A checklist, not just theory
items.description: Five things worth checking on your own site this quarter.

form.heading: One email. One PDF.
